education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical
raw_text:
35. Tool Room Maint enance Engineer

Job Summary  
Oversees maintenance activities within the tool room, ensuring tools and machines are in 
optimal working condition.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Plan and execute maintenance schedules  
• Supervise tool maintenance and repair activities  
• Ensure availability of tools for production  
• Manage spare parts and inventory  
• Coordinate with production and quality teams  
• Implement continuous improvement initiatives  
Required Skills  
• Tool room operations knowledge  
• Maintenance planning and management  
• Leadership and coordination skills  
• Problem -solving and analytical thinking  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical  
Experience  
• 4–8 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹35,000 – ₹70,000 per month
